title: 🚀 Calling All monday.com + Slack Users! We Need Your Input! 🚀

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com Community!

Do you use Slack + monday.com in your workflow? We want to hear from you!

We’re running a quick & fun survey to better understand how you use these two platforms together and what improvements would make your experience even smoother. Your feedback will help shape the future of Slack & monday.com integrations!

Got 5 minutes? Share your thoughts here:
Take the Survey!

As a thank you, you’ll receive a special gift for completing the survey!

We appreciate your time and insights—plus, it’s a great way to have a say in what’s next! Thanks for being an awesome part of the monday.com community!
